reviews.review_title: Its a very fun Prank App
reviews.review_description:
Video Review on my Youtube Channel

This is a fun prank game, only short 3 levels but you dont have the full fun off it until you see what you look like playing the game. 

Suggestive hand gestures will always be fun. Dont see to many prank games available so its a nice surprise.

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR Pranks
reviews.review_description: This reminds me of back in the day where you'd ask your friend to watch a harmless video just to jumpscare them...but this is pranking on a whole different level...
